titleStmt.title: Record of an Excursion to Jue Peak
遊珏峯記

msIdentifier.repository: 珏山正顶云梯石崖 (in situ 原處)

msContents.summary: 游珏峰记（順治辛丑十八年）。Critical edition collated from 4 independent published transcriptions (《泽州碑刻大全》(2013), 《晋城金石志》(1995), 《泽州碑刻大全》(2013), 《晋城佛教金石录》(2016)). Collation quality flagged “unreliable” (low-alignment witnesses: B, C, D); apparatus provisional, pending autopsy.

revisionDesc.change: Generated from Zezhou crosswalk collation sidecar C0012.json (A=sha256-040b54a0837b4707 B=sha256-81b1126e66f3a61f C=sha256-949f538ee6bb8f98 D=sha256-65bdee8932929fdd). Collation quality: unreliable (confidence 0.5).
